feed.title: AO3 - Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Hundred Day Curse
entry.summary:
Author: SolaceInSpace

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 150,747Chapters: 39/?Kudos: 4,744

Summary: Gotham was literally cursed but no one believed Bruce. He took it upon himself to fix it and after decades of searching, that solution came to him in the form of a little blue vial. Bruce was to take the curse within himself to temper it into something manageable.He thinks the others would call him stupid and stop him if they knew about this, but (un)fortunately for Bruce, his family hasn't spoken to him for forever. There was no one here to stop him.He downed the liquid and woke up as his nine-year-old self.Ch3 Excerpt:“Mother, do you remember those funny clouds above people’s heads I told you about? Well, I’m doing something about them but the process is very lonely. Or not. I think it’s just me. I’m the problem. I can’t seem to get people to like me enough to stay. I know–-… I’m aware that it’s due to my own shortcomings but sometimes, it feels like even the worst monsters have people that love them and yet I have no one.”Bruce let out a humourless chuckle and rested his forehead on his knees.“I just wish there was someone that cared about me.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Ace the Bat-Hound & Bruce Wayne
  • Bruce Wayne & Original Character(s)

entry.title: Another Perspective
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 88,136Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 472

Summary: A clash of opposing plans causes Batman to accidentally be doused with a hybrid of not-quite-Fear Toxin and Ivy's pheromones. In order to cope with the opposing influences, his brain convinces him that the four Rogues who were keyed to them - Scarecrow, Ivy, Harley Quinn, and Riddler - have been deaged into children. Obviously he'll have to bring them home and look after them until an antidote is made. Meanwhile, by order of the Batkids in order to NOT break Batman's mind, said Rogues are forced to play along.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Funhouse Mirror
entry.summary:
Author: chibinekogirl101

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,544Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 276

Summary: Joker Junior, the young plucky sidekick to the heroic vigilante known as The Joker, is 'rescued' from the former 'home' he's imprisoned in and is unceremoniously dragged to a different dimension by a man wearing his murderer's face! But with Damian locked in a cell, his Papa out of reach, and Batgirl left behind? He can't say this feels like much of a rescue... [inspired by Another Mirror by byrambles]

entry.title: Our Monkey, Our Circus
entry.summary:
Author: gardenfire45

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,476Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 53

Summary: Alfred wants the Batfamily to get along It end up as we all expected, Chaos... At least it's entertaining... Stephanie: I can't believe I'm being a third wheel rnStephanie: I thought you guys are over??? Jason: Same Steph... Same Dick: we're not dating anymore but it doesn't mean we can't be nice to each other

entry.title: Batman: Hiraeth
entry.summary:
Author: Momtobatsons

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,381Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: Katherine Carter always believed in the police. Until her father died being called corrupt. Back in Gotham, she finds a city worse than she remembered, and far more dangerous than she ever imagined. While trying to uncover what really happened, Katherine crosses paths with people who shouldn't be part of her life… but somehow end up being. A vigilante who doesn't follow rules, boys who don't trust anyone. And a family you don't choose, but that might choose you. Because in Gotham, surviving alone is hard. But trusting someone might be even more dangerous.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Reflections Don't Lie
entry.summary:
Author: Ceru_13

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 67,665Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 3

Summary: What if the only way to heal the Batfamily is to break them? It was as close to normal as Gotham child tragedies could get. High school should have been normal. Where Jason Todd could mind his own business and be with someone he cared about. Where Jason Todd could feel like just once, maybe, there was stability in Gotham. It shouldn't have been on him to save her. There should have been someone who caught it, not a reckless kid from Crime Alley. There should have been someone to catch it before anything happened. They shouldn't have died. Especially not like that. And they should have stayed dead. Stay at rest. But instead, they came back. Broken. Wrong. Sharpened into something ugly that only grief and rage with nowhere to go can create. When he comes back, the Bats do what they do best: Repress. Move on. Plan contingencies so this never happens again. But you don't learn lessons if you don't have to look yourself in the eye and reckon with the truth. So what happens when another mirror that can't be angled away comes back shattered into something unrecognizable? When all she does is reflect back the consequences of their moral absolutism?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: helmed
entry.summary:
Author: TheResurrectionist

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,869Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 861

Summary: The man was tall. Slim in the chest, but with shoulders that gladly filled out the tactical clothing under his tac vest. The collar of his shirt ended just under his jaw, made all the more stark by the contrast of thick, silver hair above. There were a half-dozen weapons hidden on his person. His boots were reinforced at the toe and heel, the leather combat-grade and a deep, telltale black.Alfred Pennyworth walked down the center of the aisle, well-aware of the attention he’d garnered and entirely indifferent to it.

entry.title: Not-So-Solitary
entry.summary:
Author: girlbrainiac

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,957Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 306

Summary: After a mis-aimed batarang throw, Batman managed to hold onto the Red Hood in the subsequent explosion. Fearing that he could lose his son again, Bruce keeps Jason locked in the Bat Cave. Jason is exactly where he never wanted to be: stuck in a glass case amidst a colony of Bats he swore he wanted nothing to do with ever again. More annoying than that, though, they refuse to leave him alone or stop talking to him. Sheesh. Now he almost wished they'd sent him to Arkham. ...Almost.

entry.title: A love lost and found
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,397Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 189

Summary: Bruce Wayne dies. The world moves on.Seven years later, Bruce Anthony Williams steps inside Gotham once more and soon learns that the past has an incorrigible way to catch up with him.

entry.summary:

entry.title: Mr. and Mrs. Wayne
entry.summary:
Author: GothamNocturne

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,381Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 25

Summary: Bruce Wayne finally chooses the life he once believed he couldn't have - a wife, a daughter, and a world he's trying to hold together.But peace in Gotham never comes without a cost.When an old debt pulls Selina into something she can't walk away from, secrets begin to fracture the foundation of both their marriage and the Justice League. As whispers of invasion spread and trust begins to erode, Bruce is forced to make an impossible choice:Stand with the world.Or stand with his family.Because sometimes the greatest threat isn't the one descending from the stars -It's the one everyone believes is already inside your home.And this time, the cowl may not survive the cost.

entry.summary:
Author: Stsrmoonlit

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 55,716Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 11

Summary: It's a story written about the Batman family and It's about Bruce Wayne adopting a child again with this child being different from the rest of his other adopted children and the entire Wayne family became overprotective of this child and so did their friends but this child has a secret and can she keep it from her new family or will they find out her secret and I've made my own character, hope you like this

entry.title: I will find you, whenever you are
entry.summary:
Author: Florchus

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,596Chapters: 15/18Kudos: 190

Summary: One accident scatters the Robins across time. Dick. Jason. Tim. Damian. Alone in unfamiliar eras, they must survive long enough to find each other again. Meanwhile, Bruce is left with silence where his family should be.

entry.title: Sawdust Eaters
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,964Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 46

Summary: Adrien gets added to a family group chat and he's going to make it their problem.Things take a very interesting turn as this turns out to be no ordinary family. Dick is never going to be able to visit Paris. Tim might lose his mind. Jason is having a good time.A game of Cat & Mouse begins between Adrien and Tim. What was supposed to be a simple game of chase to spice up Adrien's depressing life, becomes a whirlwind romance between the two as they chase one another across Gotham.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Lights! Cameras! And ACTION!
entry.summary:
Author: Fishwithabow

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 59,975Chapters: 14/25Kudos: 146

Summary: You are Bruce’s Wayne only BLOOD daughter. He adopted you when you were nine following your mother’s sudden death. Your mother used to be a well known actor and so of course, like mother like daughter, you too wanted to be an actor. Your father and your new siblings for some reason tend to forget about you and end up leaving you in their dust. Will that ever change? Will you become famous before they ever notice you? Or will something happen that will change your whole view of your life? CURRENTLY REVISING STORY!! NO NEW CHAPTERS UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE!!

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,310Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 42
